blocks.content: Cade and Davenport went to the kitchen. Detective Serrano stayed in the living room with the other four, notepad open, face neutral.
The remaining four sat with what had just been said.

blocks.speaker: Sophie
blocks.content: Sometimes you protect people from their friends more than from anyone else.
Dean had no answer for that. He looked at the kitchen door.
She said it quietly. Not a defense — a statement. The tone of someone who had already thought through it and arrived.

blocks.speaker: Sophie
blocks.content: We all know Cade. We thought we knew Marcus too.
Nadia had said nothing since Gideon Price's name was spoken. She was looking at the kitchen door. Her expression was unreadable. Her hands were still in her lap.

blocks.speaker: Nadia
blocks.content: I think we should let Davenport do his job.
She looked at Dean. Then back at her hands.
